profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Lupromax Pelumas Indonesia Tbk distributes and sells lubricating oil to the retail and automotive sectors in Indonesia. The company offers additive products, including engine additives, fuel additives, and aerosol. It also provides oil products, such as gasoline engine, motorcycle, diesel engine, transmission, and industrial oils. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia.
